title: RaceTechAssistant
description: A simple website to calculate fuel and optimize setups for Assetto Corsa Competizione races.

title: Maratona
description: A collection of web-based tools for runners, including pace zone calculators, race pace estimators, and more running performance utilities.

title: Quizium
description: A modern, interactive web application that allows users to take quizzes on a variety of subjects.
